features.name: dual_port_ram_separate_always_blocks
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM inference pattern using separate always @(posedge clk) blocks for read and write operations, where each block has its own conditional enable signal

features.name: dual_port_ram_nested_if_else_single_always
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM pattern where read and write operations are combined in a single always @(posedge clk) block using nested if-else statements with compound enable conditions
features.snippet:
reg [63:0] mem [0:(1<<SIZE)-1];
always @(posedge clk) if (sel) begin if (~we) dat_o <= mem[adr]; else mem[adr] <= dat_i; end

features.name: ram_enable_from_compound_conditions
features.description: Code should include RAM read/write enable signal generation where the enable is a compound boolean expression combining multiple control signals (e.g., sel & we for write, sel & ~we for read)
features.snippet:
if (sel & we) mem[adr] <= dat_i;
if (sel & ~we) dat_o <= mem[adr];
